event: Pope Clement VII crowning Emperor Charles V
description: A large ceiling fresco showing a grand coronation ceremony. In the upper register, a papal figure (Clement VII) is seated on a raised platform surrounded by clergy in mitres and vestments, performing the crowning of a kneeling figure (Charles V) before a vast assembly of courtiers, soldiers, and dignitaries. Banners and flags are visible. The lower register shows a densely packed crowd of figures in various states of activity. The composition is viewed from below in typical ceiling perspective, with elaborate gilded framing visible at the edges.
